eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Utah; at 11:01 PM on MAY 23, 2026 Effective until 4:01 AM MAY 24, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The first suspect is identified as Dane Stephen Richman. He is 6 feet 2 inches tall, weighing 195 pounds. He has brown hair and green eyes. He was last seen wearing unknown. The first child abduction victim is identified by police as Wesley Dane Richman. He is 0 and was wearing unknown. He has blonde or strawberry hair and blue eyes. He is 2 feet 2 inches tall, weighing about 23 pounds. The second child abduction victim is identified by police as Will Thomas Richman. He is 1 and was wearing unknown. He has blonde or strawberry hair and blue eyes. He is 2 feet 6 inches tall, weighing about 31 pounds. The abduction happened at Saratoga Springs. The suspect was driving a blk Toyt CAM, with license plate A561HL. If you have any information, please call Police at 8 0 1 7 9 8 5 6 0 0 or simply dial 9 1 1.
